title: QDC Pushy Pully Mergy
description: Push, Pull and Merge blocks that generate currency for main QDC Mod
body:
**NOTE: This mod is no longer maintained on this project, it has been added as part of the new QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft version.**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0](https://modrinth.com/mod/qdc-core-4.0)

This is a mod where you can generate some blocks that automatically generate currency for the main QDC Mod - QDC Quantum Dis-Assembly Craft.


The first thing you need to create is a Block Dispenser, when given power with a button it generated the mod's blocks for a cost of particles.


There are 4 types of particles:

Nature

Food

Metal

Gem


The blocks generated can only be pushed or pulled, pushed by right clicking with an empty hand, pulled by right clicking and holding shift key.
 

When 3 blocks of the same type and tier are pushed from the side, they will merge into a higher tier block.
 

There are 5 tiers, each tier generates more particles than the blocks used to create it.
